title: Glotfile state file
description: Schema for glotfile.json — the single source of truth for a Glotfile translation catalog. See https://glotfile.dev/docs/concepts/the-state-file/.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Stamped automatically; enables editor autocomplete and validation.

glossary.description: Do-not-translate terms and forced per-locale translations, injected into every AI request.

glossarySuggestions.description: AI-proposed glossary candidates awaiting review (see `glotfile suggest-glossary`). Dismissed entries are kept as tombstones so re-runs never resurface them.

keys.description: Flat map of dot-notation keys (e.g. "auth.signIn.button") to their entries.

sourceLocale.description: The locale you author in. Must be one of `locales`.

locales.description: Every locale (BCP-47) you maintain, including the source.

outputs.description: Where exported locale files are written — one entry per format.

autoExport.description: When true (default), `glotfile serve` re-exports to disk on every change.

exportLocales.description: Allow-list narrowing which locales every export writes. Empty/absent = all of `locales`.

storage.description: On-disk layout. "split" persists the catalog as a glotfile/ directory of per-locale files; absent/"single" keeps the monolithic glotfile.json.

emptyAs.description: How to render a missing/empty value.

skipSourceLocale.description: Don't write a file for the source locale (e.g. Angular, whose generator owns messages.xlf).

localeMap.description: Per-locale exact override (canonical code -> export token). Wins over localeCase.

LocaleCase.description: Locale-code rendering style for {locale} path/file tokens. Unset = the adapter's default.

model.description: Model id for the selected provider.

endpoint.description: Custom API endpoint (e.g. an OpenAI-compatible gateway), or null.

region.description: Region for the provider (e.g. AWS Bedrock), or null.

batchSize.description: How many strings to send per request.

concurrency.description: How many locales to translate in parallel. Defaults to 3.

inputPricePerMTok.description: $ per 1M input tokens; overrides the built-in price table when both prices are set.

outputPricePerMTok.description: $ per 1M output tokens; overrides the built-in price table when both prices are set.

FormatConfig.description: Deterministic serialization settings that keep git diffs minimal.

customWords.description: Words accepted by both the editor's live spell check and the `spelling` lint rule.

rules.description: Per-rule severity overrides, keyed by rule id.

ignore.description: Key globs to skip when linting.

accessors.description: Extra Flutter gen_l10n accessor names the scanner should recognize.

patterns.description: Custom usage-scan regexes (capture group 1 = key) applied to every file.

keep.description: Key globs always treated as used, for keys consumed by code the scanner can't see.

wholeWord.description: Apply the term only when it appears as a standalone word in the source, not inside a larger word (e.g. "Pro" won't match "Process"). Defaults to true; set false to match inside larger source words.

note.description: Rationale written by the model; becomes GlossaryEntry.notes on accept.

status.description: "pending" awaits review; "dismissed" is a tombstone so re-runs never resurface it.

context.description: Context for humans and the AI translator.

contextSource.description: Set when the context was AI-generated.

maxLength.description: Maximum character length; over-length translations are rejected.

screenshot.description: Path/ref to an image showing where the string appears.

plural.description: Presence marks this key as a plural message.

placeholders.description: Typed placeholder metadata, keyed by placeholder name.

LocaleValue.description: Scalar keys carry `value`; plural keys carry `forms` — exactly one, per the owning key's plural marker.

forms.description: ICU plural forms (plural keys). Keys are CLDR categories or exact selectors like "=0"; must include "other".

origin.description: Set when captured from an Angular <x/> element with a non-conventional id.

Suppression.description: A dismissed lint finding for one (rule, locale). Expires when the key's source content hash changes.
